error_signature: workflow never proceeds past the scheduled trigger
title: Schedule trigger not proceeding in manual test
symptom: When manually testing a workflow with a weekly schedule trigger, it runs indefinitely without proceeding past the trigger node.
not_this_if: The workflow is triggered by an event or webhook
root_cause: The Schedule trigger node requires a non-zero value for 'Weeks Between Triggers'. If this value is set to 0, the workflow will not execute as expected during manual testing.
fix_steps: Open the schedule trigger node settings
Change the 'Weeks Between Triggers' value from 0 to 1
agent_instruction: Set 'Weeks Between Triggers' to 1 in the schedule trigger node settings.
